title: Robots
text: Home * Artificial Intelligence * Robots Personal Robot 04 by Franz Steiner [1] An interesting field related to Artificial Intelligence, which still arouse public media interest, are autonomous chess playing Robots , as recently designed by Konstantin Kosteniuk in Russia . The robot will represent Russia at the first ever International Robot Blitz Chess Championship announced to take place in 2011 [2] [3] . Robots are mechanical intelligent agents , and may interact like an human chess player, recognizing the moves either by incorporating a sensory board , or more sophisticated by computer vision [4] and real-time video image processing , and moving pieces with a mechatronical actuator and end effector .
